fields.name: name
fields.label: Section Name
fields.description: The label shown for this section in the Content Tree

fields.name: containerDesktop
fields.label: Container Width (Desktop)
fields.description: Restrict the section width on desktop. 1100/700 centre the section on the page.

fields.name: containerMobile
fields.label: Container Width (Mobile)
fields.description: Restrict the section width on mobile. 1100/700 centre the section on the page.

fields.name: paddingDesktop
fields.label: Horizontal Padding (Desktop)
fields.description: Adds left/right padding to the section on desktop.
